nasb.text: Be like men who are waiting for their master when he returns from the wedding feast, so that they may immediately open the door to him when he comes and knocks.

esv.text: and be like men who are waiting for their master to come home from the wedding feast, so that they may open the door to him at once when he comes and knocks.

cnv.text: 像等候自己的主人從婚筵回來一樣，好叫你們在主人回來敲門時，立刻給他開門。

ccb.text: 像奴仆们等候主人从婚宴回来。主人回来一叩门，奴仆就可以立即给他开门。

csbs.text: 要像期待着主人从婚宴上回来的人那样；好在主人回来敲门的时候，能立刻为他开门。
